name: Fruit and Sour Cream Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 1 can pineapple chunks in juice, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage very finely and place it in a covered bowl or plastic bag. Chill.
2. For the dressing: In a separate container, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, sugar, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and cinnamon. Chill.
3. Drain the pineapple thoroughly, rinse the grapes, and add them to the pineapple. Chill.
4. Just before serving, wash, core, and slice the apples into thin pieces. Cut the apples in half again. Mix the apples with the grapes and pineapple.
5. Toss the apples, grapes, and pineapple mixture well with the shredded cabbage.
6. Add the dressing gradually, tossing to coat. Be careful not to add too much at once. This variation of coleslaw is unique but very good and easy to prepare. Prepare the ingredients ahead of time and assemble the salad whenever you are ready.
